exportPipeline.objective: Hold two international accounts well and add three more specialty importers by the end of 2027.

account.quality: Demanding on panel score, fair on price, takes the flagship N-1 lot first.
Wants high polyphenol numbers on the certificate of analysis and tidy provenance notes.
Small allocations, pays on time, values the single-estate story for its shelf cards.

prospect.note: Sample pack and current certificate of analysis sent 2026-02-11. Follow up after the autumn pressing.
Intro call set for 2026-10-14 through the cooperative export programme. Wants organic from 2027.
Early interest in early-harvest Picual. No contact made yet, holding until certified organic oil is available.
Flagged at the regional oliviculture conference. Cold, long horizon, low priority during harvest.

nextActions.action: Hold the booked intro call and send the new harvest tasting notes after first pressing.
Meet two prospects in person at the Olive Oil Harvest Fair in Jaen.
